titleStmt.title: SII 26.156: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 156. (A.R. No. 148 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is incomplete at the end. It records a gift of paddy, made by the king, to provide food daily for three ascetics (tapassiyar) of the Tiruttoṇḍattogaiyāṉ-maṭham in the Vīrachōḻan-tirumaḍaiviḷāgam of the temple of Vīrachōḷīśvaram-uḍaiyār in Koḻumam. It is stipulated that one tapassiyar would chant the Tirumuṟai and offer worship to the deity and another would attend to the preparation of the bed-chamber of the deity. The work allotted to the third tapassiyar is not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakra
vatti koṉeriṉmaiko
ṇṭāṉ karaivaḻināṭṭu
k koḻumattu Āḷuṭai
yār viracoḷiśvaramuṭai
yār viracoḻan tirumaṭaiviḷā
katut tiruttoṇṭattokaiyaṉ maṭa
ttut tapassiyaṟku nammolaikuṭuttapaṭi
yāvatu Immaṭattukku namakku naṉṟāka muṉ
ṟu tapassiyaṟku jivanattukku nām vaitta santi
Oṉṟukku per Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku nel
kuṟuṇiyākap po muṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku
nel mukkuṟuṇiyāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaṟupat
taiñcukku nel toṇṇūṟṟoru kalaney mu
kkuṟuṇikkum koḻumattūrār namakku Iṟu
ttu varumeykkaṭamaiyil muṉpu nam Akana
mutalāka Aḷantu varunellile yiṉ
nellu nām nikkiṉamaiyil Irupattaiñcā
vatu picāṉamutal Āṇṭuvaraiyum Aṭu
ttū kakkoṇṭu varuvārkaḷākavum I
ttapassiyar muvaril muṉṟu santiyun tirumuṟai
yotiy pūcit tirummāṉantalum tiruppaḷḷi
aṟaiyun nokki paṭimam paricarittup pūcicciru
roruvarum vaiyakat taṅkipparaippe
ruvāroru tapassiyarum Āka Ippaṭi muṉṟu sa
ntiyil munṟu kalamum Irupattañcāvatu picā
ṉamutal cantirātittavaraiyil vaṭuttuk
koṇṭu Ikkala muṉṟuñ celvatākavum
Ivvūril
pakkal namvari pāttu ti
na mutalile nelkalamit toṇṇūṟ
ṟorukalane mukkuṟuṇiyum muṭṭāl koṭu
Ippaṭi cempiluñ cilaiyilum
Digital edition of SII 26.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
